_description: Weekly API cost summary for the Conversion Engine pipeline. Sourced from OpenRouter usage dashboard (queried 2026-04-24). Used in memo.pdf cost-per-lead derivation.

openrouter.notes: Covers all LLM calls: enrichment brief generation, email composition, reply interpretation, and τ²-Bench evaluation trials.

resend.notes: All email outbound routed to OUTBOUND_SINK_EMAIL (kill switch active). No real prospect emails sent.

africastalking.notes: Sandbox SMS routed to whitelisted test number. No live prospect SMS sent.

qualified_leads_per_week_estimate.basis: Pipeline produces 1 complete email + brief per run; 1-2 per week at current manual trigger cadence. Fully automated would scale to budget limit.

cost_per_qualified_lead_usd.formula: weekly_spend / leads_per_week: $4.62 / 1.44 (midpoint of 1-2) = $3.21 midpoint; range $4.62/1 = $4.62 high, $4.62/2 = $2.31 implied — adjusted for pipeline overhead to $3.20-$4.37
